# pheno-fastapi-base

Canonical FastAPI base for the pheno-* service fleet. Used by every pheno-*
HTTP service.

## Public API

- `create_app(title, version)` — FastAPI factory with `/healthz`, `/readyz`,
  structlog access-log middleware, `app.started` startup hook, and `AppError`
  exception handler.
- `AppError(code, message, details)` — framework-agnostic exception with
  stable wire-code mapped to HTTP status via `code_to_status`.
- `AsyncTestClient` — thin wrapper over `httpx.AsyncClient` driving the app
  in-process via `httpx.ASGITransport` (no live uvicorn needed).

## Conventions

- When to use: any new pheno-* HTTP service.
- When NOT to use: non-HTTP services.
- 5-line quickstart:
  ```python
  from pheno_fastapi_base import create_app, AppError
  app = create_app(title="my-service", version="0.1.0")
  @app.get("/items/{id}")
  async def get_item(id: str):
      raise AppError("NotFound", f"no item {id}")
  ```

## Probe contracts

- `GET /healthz` → 200 `{"status": "ok"}` always.
- `GET /readyz` → 200 `{"status": "ready"}` once startup hook completed.

## Quality bar

- 71-pillar score: 23/71 (Tier 0)
- Test matrix: 5 contract tests + smoke (`tests/test_app.py`)
- License: dual (MIT + Apache-2.0)
